segments.voice_english: One teenager left Portugal to chase football glory, but nobody knew he would conquer Europe.

segments.subtitle_english: One teenager left Portugal to chase football glory, but nobody knew he would conquer Europe.
segments.voice_hindi: फुटबॉल की प्रसिद्धि के लिए एक किशोर ने पुर्तगाल छोड़ दिया, लेकिन किसी को नहीं पता था कि वह यूरोप को जीत लेगा।

segments.voice_english: He became Cristiano Ronaldo after he won his first of five FIFA best player awards.
segments.subtitle_english: He became Cristiano Ronaldo after he won his first of five FIFA best player awards.
segments.voice_hindi: फीफा के पांच सर्वश्रेष्ठ खिलाड़ी पुरस्कारों में से अपना पहला पुरस्कार जीतने के बाद वह क्रिस्टियानो रोनाल्डो बन गए।

segments.voice_english: He wanted more than just one trophy, so he chased four European Golden Shoes instead.
segments.subtitle_english: He wanted more than just 1 trophy, so he chased four European Golden Shoes instead.
segments.voice_hindi: वह सिर्फ एक ट्रॉफी से अधिक चाहता था, इसलिए उसने इसके बजाय चार यूरोपीय गोल्डन शूज़ का पीछा किया।

segments.voice_english: He joined Al-Nassr because he wanted to captain Portugal to more international football victories.
segments.image_query: Cristiano Ronaldo Portugal national football team
segments.subtitle_english: He joined Al-Nassr because he wanted to captain Portugal to more international football victories.
segments.voice_hindi: वह अल-नासर में शामिल हो गया क्योंकि वह पुर्तगाल को अधिक अंतरराष्ट्रीय फुटबॉल जीत दिलाने के लिए कप्तानी करना चाहता था।

segments.voice_english: He won three UEFA Men's Player awards, but is he the greatest European player ever?
segments.subtitle_english: He won three UEFA Men's Player awards, but is he the greatest European player ever?
segments.voice_hindi: उन्होंने तीन यूईएफए पुरुष खिलाड़ी पुरस्कार जीते, लेकिन क्या वह अब तक के सबसे महान यूरोपीय खिलाड़ी हैं?

Haaland aur Bellingham bhi 7 goals par neck-to-neck hain! Aapko kya lagta hai, is baar Golden Boot kaun jeetega? Apni prediction niche comments mein batao! 👇

data.description: Leicester City ka wo 2016 ka miracle toh yaad hi hoga, jab unhone poori duniya ko shock kar diya tha! 🏆 But kya aapko pata hai ki football history me isse bhi bade underdogs rahe hain? Ranieri ki prediction se lekar Kante ke saste transfer tak, sab dekhlo. Aapka sabse favourite underdog moment kaunsa hai? Comment me batao! 👇
